title: Linked Inventories
description: Links all players' inventories together - everyone shares the same items in real-time.
body:
# Linked Inventories

**Ever wanted to truly share everything with your friends?** This plugin creates a fully synchronized inventory system where all players on the server share the exact same inventory in real-time.

## How It Works

When one player picks up an item, **everyone gets it**. When someone crafts a tool, **it appears in everyone's inventory**. Drop something? **It disappears from everyone**.

### Death Mechanics

The plugin adds an intense cooperative element: when any player dies, **everyone's inventory is cleared**. All items drop on the ground at the death location, and the team must work together to recover them. No keeping items safe by staying away from danger - everyone shares the consequences!

## Features

✅ **Real-time synchronization** - Instant inventory updates across all players  
✅ **Full inventory support** - Main inventory, armor slots, and off-hand  
✅ **Join syncing** - New players automatically receive the shared inventory  
✅ **Death penalties** - Team-wide inventory loss on death  
✅ **Performance optimized** - Designed to prevent lag and infinite loops  
✅ **Compatible** with other plugins using proper event priorities  

Transform your server into a true team survival experience where communication and cooperation are essential!
